cards.back: The process of examining data collected from IoT devices to gain insights and make informed decisions.
A subset of AI that enables systems to automatically learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed.

cards.front: Big Data Analytics Tools and Technology
cards.back: Big data analytics tools and technology, such as Hadoop, Spark, and NoSQL databases, used to process and analyze large amounts of data.
Real-time analytics that occurs at the edge of the network, closer to the IoT device, to reduce latency and improve response time.
Data generated by IoT devices, such as sensor readings, location information, and device status, which is used to inform decision-making and improve operations.
